meaning: n.方形,小心拘谨,一丝不苟
examples: The Demagnetization curve has a perfect squareness.
Measure the straightness parallelism and squareness.
Her jaw line tightened to squareness and her eyes went emerald.
Later, walking through the city with the architect and artist Mark Shepard, the sheer squareness of the city is discussed.
